title: Login page not loading
description: The login page keeps showing a blank screen after entering credentials.

title: Email notifications not sent
description: No email notifications are being sent for new user registrations.

title: SLOW dashboard performance
description: Dashboard takes over 10 seconds to load analytics data.

title: Unable to reset password
description: Password reset link returns a 404 error.

title: Mobile view layout issue
description: The header overlaps the content on iPhone SE devices.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Users report payment failure during checkout.

title: Broken image links on homepage
description: Some product images are missing or not displaying properly.

title: Search functionality not returning results
description: Search API call fails with a 500 error.

title: User avatars not saving
description: Uploading avatars shows success but doesn’t update in profile.

title: Dark mode not persisting
description: Dark mode resets to light theme after page reload.

title: API rate limit error
description: Frequent 429 responses from the analytics API.
